DOWNFALL-SCRY.description: Look at the top X cards of your draw pile. You may discard any of them.
DOWNFALL-SCRY.title: Scry
DOWNFALL-ENCODE.title: Encode
DOWNFALL-ENCODE.description:
Encode a card.
When 3 cards are Encoded, their effects (other than Encode) are merged into a Function that costs [blue]1[/blue]
DOWNFALL-COMPILE.title: Compile
DOWNFALL-COMPILE_ERROR.title: Compile Error
DOWNFALL-COMPILE.description:
An effect that triggers when this card is merged into a Function.
Can be negative effect, which is referred to as an 'Error'.
DOWNFALL-STATUS.title: Status
DOWNFALL-STATUS.description: Status cards are removed at the end of combat.
DOWNFALL-CYCLE.title: Cycle
DOWNFALL-CYCLE.description: Discard a card, drawing a new card to replace it.
DOWNFALL-INSERT.title: Insert
DOWNFALL-INSERT.description: Shuffle a card into you draw pile.
